tagline: Tampa Bay's Trusted Custom Pool Builder

hero.headline: Your Dream Pool, Built Right
hero.subheadline: For 18+ years, owner Eric Larsen has personally guided Tampa Bay families from first sketch to final splash. Transparent pricing, award-winning design, and the Golden Rule at every step.

services.headline: Custom Pool Solutions for Tampa Bay Families
services.subtitle: From concept to completion, every project is crafted with precision and backed by our Golden Rule promise.

items.title: Custom Pool Construction
items.description: Shotcrete pools built for strength, durability, and complete design flexibility — tailored to your lifestyle and backyard.

items.title: Pool Renovation & Restoration
items.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with resurfacing, retiling, PebbleTec finishes, and full deck renovations.

items.title: 3D Pool Design
items.description: See your dream pool come to life in photorealistic 3D before a single shovel hits the ground.

items.title: Water Features
items.description: Custom waterfalls, fountains, and spillovers that transform your pool into a private resort experience.

items.title: Fire Features
items.description: Dramatic fire bowls and fire pits that add warmth and luxury to your outdoor living space.

items.title: Spa & Hot Tub Construction
items.description: Custom-built spas designed to complement your pool with therapeutic jets and seamless integration.

steps.title: Free Consultation & 3D Design
steps.description: Meet with Eric and the design team to share your vision. We'll create a photorealistic 3D rendering so you see exactly what you're getting.

steps.title: Transparent Proposal & Timeline
steps.description: Receive a detailed line-item proposal with no hidden costs. Your dedicated project manager keeps you informed at every milestone.

steps.title: Expert Construction & Final Walkthrough
steps.description: Our in-house crews build your pool with award-winning craftsmanship. We walk you through everything before your first swim.

about.label: Locally Owned Since 2008
about.headline: The Owner Answers Your Call — Not a Salesperson
about.description: Eric Larsen started building pools as a teenager and founded Larsen's Pool & Spa to fix what he saw wrong in the industry: projects losing direction, budgets ballooning, and homeowners left in the dark. Today, Eric remains personally involved in every build — answering calls, visiting job sites, and ensuring the Golden Rule guides every decision.

features.title: Owner Accessible Throughout
features.description: Eric Larsen remains personally involved and accessible throughout your entire project from design to completion.

features.title: Dedicated Project Manager
features.description: Your assigned project manager communicates at every step so you're never left wondering what's happening.

features.title: Complete In-House Team
features.description: From 3D design through construction to warranty support, everything is handled by our expert in-house team.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Line-Item Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no budget surprises. You'll know exactly what every element costs before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: The Golden Rule Guarantee
guarantee.description: We treat your project exactly how we'd want our own pool built — with honest communication, meticulous craftsmanship, and zero shortcuts. If something isn't right, we make it right. That's been our promise for 18+ years and 192 five-star reviews.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pools are completed in 8-12 weeks depending on design complexity. Your dedicated project manager provides a clear timeline and updates you at every major milestone.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater Tampa Bay Area including Pinellas County, Hillsborough County, Pasco County, Northern Manatee County, and Southern Hernando County.

faqs.question: Will the owner really be involved in my project?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Eric Larsen remains directly accessible and involved throughout every project. You'll also have a dedicated project manager for day-to-day communication.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several lending partners to provide competitive financing options. We'll discuss this during your free consultation to find the best fit for your budget.

faqs.question: What makes shotcrete construction better?
faqs.answer: Shotcrete is pneumatically applied concrete that creates a stronger, more durable pool shell compared to traditional methods. It allows for unlimited design flexibility and superior longevity.

testimonials.name: Scott Taylor
testimonials.text: From the initial meeting with Eric and the team I could easily see why this company is head and shoulders better than the rest. My pool and deck are complete now and the entire process has been flawless.

testimonials.name: Julie Daleiden
testimonials.text: I tell my friends and family that I hired the creme de la creme of pool companies, and it shows. The project was completed ahead of schedule and I was literally able to swim into the new year just like I dreamed!

testimonials.name: Mark Anderson
testimonials.text: 4 years after install — Larsens continues to be available and very responsive to my needs. I have had 4 friends use Larsen and they all had a great experience as well! Look nowhere else.

contact.headline: Ready to Build Your Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free consultation with Eric and the design team. We'll visit your home, listen to your vision, and create a plan you'll love.
benefits: Free on-site consultation with the owner

footer.description: Larsen's Pool & Spa has been building award-winning custom pools for Tampa Bay families since 2008. Owner-operated, Golden Rule driven, and committed to exceeding expectations on every project.
footer.service_area: Serving Pinellas County, Hillsborough County, Pasco County, Northern Manatee County & Southern Hernando County
